title: The Broker of Last Looks
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced intelligence analyst runs a black-market service selling final death verifications to grieving families, until a client's confirmed-dead son appears on a livestream holding hostages.
long_description: A disgraced intelligence analyst runs a black-market service selling final death verifications to grieving families, until a client's confirmed-dead son appears on a livestream holding hostages.
